games.title: Arknights
games.description: Real-time tower defense + RPG hybrid where players deploy anime "Operators" onto tiled maps to intercept enemies. Gacha-driven roster; PvE focused; intricate puzzle-style stages.

games.title: Brawl Stars
games.description: Top-down real-time 3v3 mobile shooter with a roster of distinct heroes ("brawlers"), each with a basic attack, super ability, and per-match progression. Short matches across multiple PvP and PvE modes.

games.title: Candy Crush Saga
games.description: The match-3 saga-map genre originator — swap candies to match 3+, clear levels on a world map, earn 3-star scores, with limited lives, boosters, and thousands of hand-designed levels.

games.title: Clash of Clans
games.description: Asynchronous base-building mobile strategy game. Players develop a defended village, train troops, and raid other players' bases offline in 3-minute timed attacks.

games.title: Clash Royale
games.description: Real-time 1v1 mobile PvP deckbuilder played on a 3-lane arena. Players spend a regenerating elixir resource to deploy 8-card decks and destroy the opponent's towers inside a 3-minute match (plus overtime).

games.title: Hearthstone
games.description: Turn-based collectible card game with mana crystals, hero classes, minion board combat, and spells. The archetypal modern digital CCG.

games.title: Marvel Snap
games.description: 3-lane, 6-turn simultaneous card battler where random locations reshape the board every match. Short games, deep decisions, stake-escalation via Snap.

games.title: Pokémon Unite
games.description: 5v5 mobile MOBA where players as Pokémon farm wild mons, level up, fight in lanes, and dunk scored energy into enemy goals. Short matches, simplified MOBA.

games.title: Royal Match
games.description: Match-3 puzzle game with a mansion-restoration meta-progression. King Robert's palace, rich tactile feedback, level-pack progression. Top-grossing mobile puzzle.

games.title: Toon Blast
games.description: Single-tap blast-3 puzzle — tap groups of 2+ same-color cubes to blast them; clear objectives across 5,000+ cartoon-themed levels with a team-based social meta and pre-/in-level boosters.

games.title: Vampire Survivors
games.description: Bullet-heaven roguelite where a single character auto-attacks swarms of enemies across a 30-minute run while drafting weapon and item builds.
